Dashboard Archive: 2026-03-17 Home
About This Dashboard
What It Does
Long-term momentum ranker scoring 700+ tickers on returns from 1 month to 10 years, with relative performance vs SPY over 1y/5y/10y. Same scoring engine as the short-term ranker but optimized for longer investment horizons and secular trends.
Today's Reading
LINC ranks #1 on the momentum-ranker-long dashboard with an exceptional 95.1 score, driven by extraordinary long-term returns of 1,262.64% over 10 years and 515.74% over 5 years, while consistently outperforming SPY by 1,023 percentage points over that decade. The stock shows textbook momentum strength across all timeframes (passing 4 of 5 ratio tests), sits above all major moving averages, and displays a "clean" momentum signal with confirmed volatility, earning a "strong_buy" flag. CLMT also ranks highly with a 141.38% 1-year return and 519.36% 5-year return, but reveals a critical weakness: its 10-year return of only 152.47% and negative 10-year performance versus SPY (-87.1%) and QQQ (-328.74%) suggest it underperformed during the longer secular trend, indicating its rally may be a medium-term recovery rather than sustained long-term excellence.
